---
title: "Compliance Checklist"
subtitle: "Five basics any AI-run company must have — in plain language"
toc: false
---

::: {.callout-tip appearance="simple"}
This checker teaches the basics. Want your opinion to count? Go to the
**[Public Consultation](../../consultation.qmd)** — 12 real questions, live results.
:::

```{=html}
<div id="alp-sim"></div>
<script>
(function(){
var Q=[
 {q:"1/5 — Is this AI company inscribed in an official government registry (like a company ID)?",h:"If it is not on the official list, legally it does not exist.",gap:"No official registration",c:[["Artificial Registry","../../core/concepts/artificial-registry.html"]]},
 {q:"2/5 — Is there a named person or company that answers for it?",h:"Someone identifiable must stand behind the entity.",gap:"No traceable responsible party",c:[["Liability","../../core/concepts/liability.html"]]},
 {q:"3/5 — Are its rules of operation published for anyone to read?",h:"Public rules are what judges compare conduct against.",gap:"No public rules",c:[["Governance","../../core/concepts/governance.html"]]},
 {q:"4/5 — Does it keep records of what it does (logs, sources, dated corrections)?",h:"No records, no way to judge it later.",gap:"No auditable records",c:[["Audit","../../core/concepts/audit.html"]]},
 {q:"5/5 — Does it have its own money/assets to pay if it causes harm?",h:"The entity's own assets answer first.",gap:"No own assets",c:[["Liability","../../core/concepts/liability.html"]]}];
var i=0,gaps=[];
var el=document.getElementById("alp-sim");
function fin(){
 var h='<div style="border:1px solid #1f2a44;border-radius:8px;padding:1.2rem;background:#f4f6fa">';
 if(!gaps.length){h+='<p style="font-weight:700;color:#1f2a44;margin:0 0 .4rem">All five basics present ✔</p><p style="margin:0 0 .8rem">This entity shows the full profile a lawful AI-run company should present. (Educational checker — doctrine under RFC review.)</p><p style="margin:0 0 1rem;font-size:.9rem"><a href="../../core/concepts/index.html">Read the six concepts</a></p>';}
 else{h+='<p style="font-weight:700;color:#8a1f1f;margin:0 0 .4rem">'+gaps.length+' gap(s) found</p><ul style="margin:0 0 .8rem">';gaps.forEach(function(g){h+='<li>'+g.gap+' — read: '+g.c.map(function(x){return '<a href="'+x[1]+'">'+x[0]+'</a>'}).join(", ")+'</li>'});h+='</ul><p style="margin:0 0 .8rem;font-size:.9rem">Each gap is a door to the "responsibility vacuum" — the failure a good law must close.</p>';}
 h+='<button onclick="ALP.r()" style="padding:.4rem 1.1rem;border:1px solid #1f2a44;border-radius:6px;background:#fff;color:#1f2a44;cursor:pointer">Start again</button></div>';
 el.innerHTML=h;}
function render(){
 if(i>=Q.length){fin();return;}
 var n=Q[i];
 el.innerHTML='<div style="border:1px solid #d0d4dc;border-radius:8px;padding:1.2rem;background:#fafbfc">'
  +'<p style="font-weight:600;margin:0 0 .3rem">'+n.q+'</p>'
  +'<p style="color:#555;font-size:.9rem;margin:0 0 1rem">'+n.h+'</p>'
  +'<button onclick="ALP.a(true)" style="margin-right:.6rem;padding:.45rem 1.3rem;border:0;border-radius:6px;background:#1f2a44;color:#fff;cursor:pointer">Yes</button>'
  +'<button onclick="ALP.a(false)" style="padding:.45rem 1.3rem;border:1px solid #1f2a44;border-radius:6px;background:#fff;color:#1f2a44;cursor:pointer">No</button>'
  +'<p style="margin:.9rem 0 0;font-size:.8rem;color:#888">Question '+(i+1)+' of '+Q.length+' — answering No does not stop the check.</p></div>';}
window.ALP={a:function(yes){if(!yes)gaps.push(Q[i]);i++;render()},r:function(){i=0;gaps=[];render()}};
render();
})();
</script>
```
